description_long: This is a tall, narrow apartment building with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a predominantly white facade accented by dark horizontal bands. The structure has multiple floors, each with regularly spaced rectangular windows and several balconies with simple railings. The rooftop is partially covered by a pergola structure and includes a green terrace area with visible plants and seating, suggesting communal outdoor space. The front side of the building displays the most architectural detail, including balconies and window groupings, while the sides and rear are plainer with fewer openings. The ground floor appears to have a main entrance and possibly a lobby area, with some windows set lower than the rest. The overall appearance is clean and functional, suitable for urban residential environments.
description: A tall, modern apartment building with white walls, dark accents, balconies, and a rooftop terrace with greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing multiple balconies, regularly spaced windows, and the rooftop terrace with pergola and plants.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal windows, a clear view of the rooftop pergola, and a tree visible on the terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain facade, very few windows, and a small section of the rooftop terrace visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a similar plain wall, some balcony cutouts, and the rooftop terrace with greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, vertical alignment with consistent spacing between floors and grouped in pairs or singles, contributing to a symmetrical and orderly facade.
